name: Stinkbug

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It closes to short range and throws a basic bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it from the front or step back before it fully closes in.
attacks.notes: Its simplest option when it has not yet committed to gas.

attacks.name: Gas Leap
attacks.tell: It leans back and then leaps forward before coating the impact zone in gas.
attacks.howToAvoid: Avoid the leap and do not re-enter the impact zone immediately.
attacks.notes: It deals impact damage and leaves a harmful gas cloud behind.

description: An invasive insect known for its toxic clouds. Its parts are valuable, but fighting it without gas protection is costly.
behavior: It moves slowly along the ground, often sleeping for long periods, and releases a gas cloud when it wakes. It can also emit smaller passive bursts while patrolling.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile to the player. Once it spots a target, it closes in and alternates between biting, gas-leaping, or flooding the nearby area with toxic clouds.
interactionWithCreatures: It stays neutral toward most creatures, but its gas clouds often make other species defend themselves and turn hostile toward it.
strategy: More than raw damage, the priority is controlling its gas. A gas mask or Gastro Goo changes the fight completely and opens longer punish windows after its leap and gas bursts.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 50
Gas Leap: 65
Gas Cloud: 7 per second

specialTraits: It is immune to gas hazard and can cover the ground in multiple clouds if the fight drags on.

abilities.name: Gas Release
abilities.description: It releases a gas cloud at close range or passively when waking up or walking around. The cloud deals 7 damage per second.
